metadata.name: [observant] I noticed the lab change too, and

snippets.name: [observant] I noticed the lab change too, and
snippets.text: [observant] I noticed the lab change too, and his oxygen saturation dipped overnight before coming back up. It wasn’t dramatic, but it didn’t look like a monitor error either.

snippets.name: [curious] So you’re thinking this might be ca
snippets.text: [curious] So you’re thinking this might be cardiac instead of infectious? That would line up with the fluid signs and explain the oxygen fluctuation.

snippets.name: [reassuring] You’re doing fine, we’re just do
snippets.text: [reassuring] You’re doing fine, we’re just double-checking everything and making sure we don’t miss anything. We’ll stay right here with you while the doctor checks the records.

snippets.name: [decisive] That actually makes a lot of sense
snippets.text: [decisive] That actually makes a lot of sense given his history. I’ll get the diuretics ready and set up close monitoring so we can see how he responds quickly.
